capabilities: Implement Consumer-Driven Contract Testing to verify service interactions against predefined contracts using Pact, ensuring compatibility and reliability in service communication.

procedure.action: Capture the contract specification using Pact's DSL by defining expected interactions and responses; ensure the specification is stored in a version-controlled repository.
Execute the contract tests using Pact's CLI tool, asserting that error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to the audit trail for compliance.
Assert the contract specification against the provider service using Pact's verification tool, ensuring all interactions are correctly implemented; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true.

Compose the contract testing process into the CI/CD pipeline using a tool like Jenkins or GitHub Actions, ensuring automated execution on every build; monitor for failures and alert on discrepancies by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.

Log all contract test results and metrics, including operation_duration_ms and result_code, to a centralized logging system for audit and analysis purposes using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Implement Consumer-Driven Contract Testing using Pact to ensure service interactions meet agreed contracts, leveraging agent.tool_selection derived knowledge base for tool selection.
title: Consumer-Driven Contract Testing

failureConditions: Service incompatibility when contract tests are not executed, causing unexpected failures in production environments.
Inconsistent service behavior when contract specifications are outdated, leading to misaligned expectations between consumer and provider.
Increased error rates when contract tests are not integrated into CI/CD, causing undetected contract violations.
metrics: the contract specification against the provider service using Pact's verification tool, ensuring all interactions are co
input/output type contracts match before connecting
